<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="j9mM6QmNbS-3yTLxej0e" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-484" dy="-128" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0089bf;" value="Double Ratchet：每則訊息一把獨立金鑰" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="800" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hA" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00aeff;" value="Alice 的傳送金鑰鏈" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="800" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ka1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="K_A1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="60" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ka2" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="K_A2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="180" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dha" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ef6c00;strokeColor=#a04600;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="DH
ratchet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="80" x="290" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ka3" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00aeff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="K_A3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="430" y="115" target="ka2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ar2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="dha"> relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ar4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=2;" target="ka4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" height="30" width="60" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#0089bf;fontSize=11;" value="M2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="180" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#0089bf;fontSize=11;" value="M3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="430" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e0f4ff;strokeColor=#0089bf;fontColor=#0089bf;fontSize=11;" value="M4" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="550" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="md1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="m1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="md2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka2" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="m2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="md3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka3" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="m3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="md4" edge="1" parent="1" source="ka4" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#0089bf;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" target="m4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=12;fontColor=#003e57;" value="● 對稱 ratchet：每送一則訊息推進一格，舊金鑰立即丟棄 → 前向保密" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="800" x="60" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=12;fontColor=#003e57;" value="◆ DH ratchet：收到對方訊息時跑一次新 DH，金鑰鏈整段重置 → 後向保密（PCS）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="800" x="60" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=12;fontColor=#003e57;" value="○ 每則訊息有獨立金鑰 K，加密後立即丟掉，攻擊者拿到當下 K 也無法還原其他訊息" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="800" x="60" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: ● 對稱 ratchet：每送一則訊息推進一格，舊金鑰立即丟棄 → 前向保密

div.div: ○ 每則訊息有獨立金鑰 K，加密後立即丟掉，攻擊者拿到當下 K 也無法還原其他訊息
